description: Crafted from soft leather, this brown wallet from Reid and Taylor is a fabulously stylish way to keep your money and cards safe and secure. With a textured finish, this bi-fold wallet has an embossed branding on the upper and brown synthetic leather detailing and lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use. Dimensions: 12 cm X 9.5 cm Soft leather for flexibility and durability Two compartments with fabric inner lining on the inside Multiple partitions on the bi-fold to stash away cards and coins Care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
